Video.title: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Video.summary: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Video.summary: Jason Kennedy and Wes Burrows challenge Golden Tate and Eric Decker.
Video.title: Golden Tate and Eric Decker

Image.alt: Golden Tate and Eric Decker
Golden Tate and Eric Decker
Golden Tate and Eric Decker

Video.summary: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Video.summary: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Video.summary: Watch a masterclass in senior pro pickleball as Peter Prodanov and Scott Moore take on Scott Crandall and Jose Derisi. With explosive hands, strategic play, and experience driving every point, this US Open quarterfinal is a showcase of skill, grit, and high-level doubles tactics.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Video.summary: Watch Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy compete against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon for the gold in this Women's Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Don’t miss this inspiring wheelchair hybrid doubles match from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Adaptive athletes Rob Krizmanich, Michael Lipp, Patick Huletsky, and Jeff Sylvestre bring talent, teamwork, and tenacity to the court in a showcase of the sport’s inclusive future.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: October 30, 2023 - Welcome to week 6 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Video.summary: Arielle Butler and Mari Humberg take on Simone Jardim and Allison Harris in this Women's Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Dayne Gingrich and Mircea Morariu take on Christian Bohnert and Todd Robertson in this Men's Senior Pro Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Video.summary: Dave Weinbach and Mari Humberg take on Christine Karges and Eric Oncins in this Mixed Pro Split Age Bronze Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match

Video.summary: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Pam Ruoff and Erica Marsh in this Women's Senior Pro Bronze Medal Match.

Video.summary: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the high-octane energy of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Bengaluru Jawans go head-to-head with the Rajasthan Titans at the iconic Jio World Garden in Mumbai. The stakes are higher than ever in this Day 9, Tie 16 clash, featuring elite matchups such as the "women's singles player of the season" Katrina Stewart facing off against the resilient Lorena Dupnik. Watch as tactical masters like Dusty Boyer and Jack Foster battle for supremacy in a series of intense singles and mixed doubles competitions where every point counts toward the league standings. With game-changing "Pickle Plays" and atmospheric "drums" fueling the intensity, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit and strategic precision.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Video.summary: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Video.summary: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.summary: The NPL men face off as the Scorpions take on the Iconics.
Video.title: NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)
NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)
NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Video.summary: The Coachella Valley Scorpions take on the Denver Iconics in a thrilling women’s National Pickleball League showdown from the 2024 season. From powerful baseline drives to lightning-fast net battles, both teams bring competitive spirit and polished teamwork to the court. Whether you're a seasoned fan or new to the NPL, this match showcases the rising talent and intensity of women’s pro pickleball. Every point matters — and momentum can shift in a flash.
Video.title: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Image.alt: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Video.title: NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

Video.summary: Pickleball pros face off! Anna Bright & Ameen Hafez vs Dylan Frazier & Ritchie Tuazon.

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 5
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 5
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 5

Video.summary: The 2022 Picklebowl offers an unforgettable mixed doubles match featuring some of the biggest names in sports. US Olympian Casey Patterson and pickleball pro Chuck Taylor join forces to take on pickleball standout Megan Fudge and former tennis world No. 5 Kevin Anderson. Set against the scenic backdrop of Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event blends elite pickleball play with charity and college pride. Expect explosive rallies, pinpoint accuracy, and powerful serves in this high-energy exhibition that showcases the crossover appeal of pickleball.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Video.title: S01E05 - The Playoffs

Image.alt: S01E05 - The Playoffs
S01E05 - The Playoffs
S01E05 - The Playoffs

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Video.summary: This episode provides courtside commentary on Game 3 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, featuring the Fort Myers Flamingos and the Old Town Bangers. The commentators highlight the aggressive play of newcomer Jada Bui and the defensive prowess of Ellie Schele. They also discuss the importance of mental toughness and team chemistry in a high-pressure environment. The episode concludes with a preview of the upcoming men's match.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.
Video.title: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Image.alt: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
